hero.title: Manage your grooming salon with ease.
hero.subtitle: Peluclic helps you streamline appointments, track customer preferences, and provide the best care for every pet.
hero.loginComingSoon: Account login coming in a future version. Try the demo to explore all features with sample data.

features.title: Everything you need to run your salon

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Effortlessly manage your daily appointments with our intuitive drag-and-drop calendar. Never double-book again.

clients.title: Client Directory
clients.description: Keep all client details, contact info, and history in one secure place.

pets.title: Pet Profiles
pets.description: Track breeds, allergies, grooming preferences, and behavioral notes.

services.title: Service Customization
services.description: Define your services, set durations, and assign specific groomers to specialized tasks to optimize your workflow.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Peluclic Grooming Solutions. All paws reserved.

register.title: Coming Soon
register.message: Registration is not yet available. Please check back later.

section1.title: 1. Demo Version Disclaimer
section1.content: The demo version of Peluclic stores all data locally in your browser using localStorage. No data is transmitted to or stored on any external server. The author of this application is not responsible for any data entered, stored, or lost while using the demo version. By using the demo, you acknowledge that your data resides solely on your device and may be lost if you clear your browser storage.

section2.title: 2. Prohibited Conduct
section2.content: Any attempt to steal, scrape, intercept, or exfiltrate data from this application — including but not limited to client information, pet records, appointment data, and service configurations — is strictly prohibited. Any attempt to manipulate, falsify, or impersonate the Peluclic portal, its branding, or its image for fraudulent, deceptive, or unauthorized purposes will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section3.content: All content, design, code, and branding associated with Peluclic are the intellectual property of their respective owners. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use of any part of this application without explicit permission is prohibited.

section4.title: 4. Contact
section4.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or the use of your data, please contact the author through the official channels.
